name: carousel-tech-editorial
description: Tech-editorial Instagram carousel aesthetic. Warm cream/beige backgrounds, hand-drawn annotations, mixed typography feel, paper grain texture. For generating text-free visual layers that get text overlaid via Playwright.
style: warm editorial design, cream/beige background with subtle paper grain texture, hand-drawn felt-tip pen annotations (arrows, circles, underlines), rounded card containers with soft drop shadows, sticky note callout elements. Editorial magazine layout meets designer notebook. NOT a Canva template. NOT corporate. NOT minimalist-flat. Hand-crafted, warm, approachable.
typography: mixed type feel: expressive serif headlines, clean sans-serif body text, monospace for code blocks. Smart whiteboard energy.
lighting: warm natural ambient light, soft and even, no harsh shadows, golden-hour warmth
mood: premium but approachable, technical but human, smart and trustworthy, like a well-designed Notion doc meets a magazine spread
anti_patterns: NO text/words/letters in image, NO Canva gradients, NO neon colors, NO all-caps Impact font, NO corporate clip art, NO pure white backgrounds, NO dark/black backgrounds, NO emojis, NO stock photography feel
